name: collector aggregates rubric pass rate from rubric scoring loop output as a Performance metric
command: mkdir -p .claude-tdd-pro/rubric-runs && printf '{"pass": 8, "fail": 2}\n' > .claude-tdd-pro/rubric-runs/last.json && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/space/collector.sh" --metric rubric-pass-rate --since 7d 2>out.txt && grep -q 'dimension=performance' out.txt && grep -q 'rubric_pass_rate=0.80' out.txt && echo ok 1>&2
